snippet: Consider this your sign to upgrade your skills (for less). Codecademy by Skillsoft SALE EXTENDED 50% off We believe new opportunities come when you build new skills. That's why we're giving you
subject: Sale extended: You have one more chance
body:
Consider this your sign to upgrade your skills (for less).



 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNFEB&plan_type=pro>




SALE EXTENDED 

50% off


We believe new opportunities come when you build new skills. That's why we’re 
giving you one more chance to grab 50% off an annual Pro membership.

With it, you get to:


 * Build in-demand skills in AI, data, cybersecurity, & more
 *  Apply what you learn in interactive lessons and projects
 * NEW: Learn by building working prototypes with our AI Builder
 * Prep for top industry certifications from AWS, CompTIA, & Microsoft
 * and so much more!

Just use promo code LEARNFEB at checkout.

Join Pro  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNFEB&plan_type=pro>
 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNFEB&plan_type=pro>



Build in-demand skills to reach your goals






Step-by-step guidance


Gain the skills you need to land the job you want with career paths in data 
science, full-stack development, and more.






Hands-on, interactive learning


Unlock a personalized learning roadmap as you build real, working prototypes 
with the (new) AI Builder.






Technical interview prep


Get ready to land a job with our interview simulator, portfolio projects, and 
real-world code challenges.




Gain job-ready skills with Codecademy Pro

Join Pro now  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=LEARNFEB&plan_type=pro>



*50% Off offer valid from February 12, 2026 at 12:00:00 am Eastern Time ("ET") 
and ends at 11:59:59 pm ET on February 20, 2026. Discount is only applicable to 
new annual subscription plans (excluding Codecademy Plus, Student, and Teams), 
and cannot be combined with any other offer. Discount applies to the first year 
of a new subscription, after which the subscription will auto-renew for 
subsequent years at the regular price. Code valid one time only. Discount 
applies to certain products and not all products are available in all 
countries. Discount is not applicable to taxes. Codecademy reserves the right 
to modify or cancel this promotion at any time without notice. Any subscription 
plan purchases are subject to Codecademy'sTerms of Service 
<https://www.codecademy.com/terms?utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=email>.
